title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Poorvika Mobiles

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Poorvika Mobiles
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Poorvika Mobiles in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poorvika Mobiles:
Poorvika Mobiles is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poorvika Mobiles!
